acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The qd report validation command reads roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validate_roadmap_export runs before coverage validation.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Every done qd node requires completion and audit reports.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validate_done_node_report_coverage checks both report paths for each done node.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Every report directory containing completion or audit JSON corresponds to a node id in the roadmap export.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validate_report_directory_coverage checks report directories against roadmap node ids.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: In-flight report directories remain allowed for claimed or review nodes before final qd merge.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The implementation only requires complete report coverage for done nodes and accepts directories for any real roadmap node.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The coverage check remains wired into just check through existing just qd-reports-check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: justfile already invokes just qd-reports-check from just check; validation passed.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Evidence records validation and qd reports.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-coverage-check/notes.md limits the claim to repository metadata validation.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report coverage validation only; no product runtime behavior is claimed.
